case_title: SBEEN AJMAL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AJMAL, SBEEN AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AJMAL, SBEEN AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - STAMP SIGNED SERVED JAN-06-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
ORDER RE; DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAVID K. TAUNTON, BANKER/PARALEGAL FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SBEEN AJMAL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE REPRESETNED BY DAVID TAUNTON, BANKER/PARALEGAL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT AT 3:45 PM AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
